title: Smeltable Raw Ore blocks
description: makes the raw ore blocks smeltable in (blast-)furnaces
body:
# Smeltable Raw Ore blocks

Isn't it frustrating that minecraft allows you to craft your raw ore into raw ore blocks, but then makes you uncraft them to smelt them? Well not anymore!

# Use

Just pop your raw ore blocks into a furnace or blast furnace, and start smelting. It's genuinly as easy as that!

![Smelting Raw Ore Blocks!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e242e840001ff8f21336adbcbfad042b11a6c3e9.png)

It scales the smelt time with the block, so it doesnt even feel cheaty!

-Works with Copper, Iron, and Gold.
